creator: _@r4k.net
text:
A while ago I pr'd the port of the OpenBSD ipsec implementation
	for ipv4 to FreeBSD. Since then I made some changes and added 
	the option to view the setup with sysctl. jkh suggested
 	to submit the whole thing again including the changes since
	nothing has happened to it so far anyway, so here it is. 

	there's some info in the readme on what goes where.
